requirement_topic.en: PNG Power Grid Connection — 240/415 V, 50 Hz and Remote-Site Power
requirement_topic.zh: PNG Power并网接入——240/415 V、50 Hz及偏远场站供电
requirement_topic.zht: PNG Power併網接入——240/415 V、50 Hz及偏遠場站供電

summary.en: Papua New Guinea supply is commonly 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz. PNG Power Ltd is the principal electricity utility for grid supply, while mining, LNG, island, and highland locations may use private generation, microgrids, or off-grid systems. EV charger projects should confirm service capacity, earthing, protection coordination, voltage tolerance, load management, metering, harmonics, and commissioning requirements with PNG Power or the site power-system owner before shipment.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚常用供电为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。PNG Power Ltd是主要电力公用事业单位；矿业、LNG、岛屿及高地场景可能采用自备发电、微电网或离网系统。电动汽车充电桩项目在出货前应与PNG Power或场站供电系统业主确认供电容量、接地、保护配合、电压容差、负载管理、计量、谐波及调试要求。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞常用供電為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。PNG Power Ltd是主要電力公用事業單位；礦業、LNG、島嶼及高地場景可能採用自備發電、微電網或離網系統。電動汽車充電樁項目在出貨前應與PNG Power或場站供電系統業主確認供電容量、接地、保護配合、電壓容差、負載管理、計量、諧波及調試要求。

standards_or_laws: PNG Power Ltd connection and service requirements
Papua New Guinea 240/415 V, 50 Hz supply practice
IEC 61000 series — power quality and electromagnetic compatibility
Project-specific microgrid or off-grid power-system specifications

summary.en: China domestic charger designs are commonly based on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply with local grid-operator acceptance. Papua New Guinea has the same 50 Hz frequency but a different 240/415 V nominal voltage, so China domestic 220/380 V markings or type tests are not enough without input-range, protection, and thermal confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩设计通常基于220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电，并按当地电网运营商验收。巴布亚新几内亚频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压为不同的240/415 V，因此仅有中国国内220/380 V标识或型式试验不足以证明适用，仍需确认输入范围、保护和热设计。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁設計通常基於220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電，並按當地電網運營商驗收。巴布亞紐幾內亞頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓為不同的240/415 V，因此僅有中國國內220/380 V標識或型式試驗不足以證明適用，仍需確認輸入範圍、保護和熱設計。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Confirm the charger covers 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase operation at 50 Hz, with appropriate protection settings and derating for hot, humid, dusty, coastal, mining, and highland environments. Do not state that Papua New Guinea voltage matches China: the frequency matches, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
gap.zh: 须确认充电桩覆盖240 V单相和415 V三相、50 Hz运行，并针对炎热、潮湿、多尘、沿海、矿区和高地环境配置保护设定及降额设计。不得声称巴布亚新几内亚电压与中国相同：两者频率相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
gap.zht: 須確認充電樁覆蓋240 V單相和415 V三相、50 Hz運行，並針對炎熱、潮濕、多塵、沿海、礦區和高地環境配置保護設定及降額設計。不得聲稱巴布亞紐幾內亞電壓與中國相同：兩者頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory — connection approval and site power-system acceptance must be confirmed with PNG Power Ltd or the relevant microgrid/off-grid owner
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid acceptance is not a PNG Power or project power-system approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Papua New Guinea-ready charger package must prove 240/415 V, 50 Hz operation and site-specific connection suitability. China 220/380 V evidence may support review, but it does not remove the voltage, protection, and project-acceptance gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向巴布亚新几内亚的充电桩资料包必须证明240/415 V、50 Hz运行能力及场站接入适用性。中国220/380 V证据可支持审查，但不能消除电压、保护和项目验收差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向巴布亞紐幾內亞的充電樁資料包必須證明240/415 V、50 Hz運行能力及場站接入適用性。中國220/380 V證據可支持審查，但不能消除電壓、保護和項目驗收差距。
